meaning: n.(使生物标本染上荧光的)荧光染料,荧色物
examples: It revealed that BCP fluorochrome stain is a valuable method for malaria diagnosis.
Fluorochrome stain assay certified that juglone can induce apoptosis of LS-174T cells.
Results the fluorochrome labelled new bone gradually replaced almost all the spongy bone and the partial cortical bone of the graft at the end of the experiment.
